title: Ethiopian coffee, prepared for global markets.
intro: Connect with Hayked for Ethiopian Arabica coffee, professional preparation, organized storage and responsive export coordination.
aboutTitle: A coffee-export partner focused on clarity, preparation and reliable communication.
aboutText: Hayked General Trading PLC is an Ethiopian-owned company active in coffee processing, warehousing and export coordination, serving buyers who value clear communication and dependable preparation.
coffeeTitle: Ethiopian coffee offers presented with clarity.
coffeeText: Explore current and buyer-specific coffee enquiries. Origin, process, grade, crop information and availability are confirmed through the export team.
serviceTitle: Connected services from preparation to shipment coordination.
serviceText: Hayked connects preparation, storage, quality communication and export coordination in one clear operational journey.
qualityText: Present procedures, lot information and documents clearly, then invite the buyer to request the current offer list or a sample.
ctaTitle: Tell us what you need from Ethiopia.
ctaText: Share your preferred coffee profile, required volume and destination so the team can prepare the right response.
